summary: Full-Stack Developer with experience in client solution delivery, API integration, and system automation. Delivered complete technical projects from concept to deployment, with hands-on experience in cloud platforms and workflow automation.

highlights: Delivered completed game released on Steam
Managed project timeline and resolved technical integration issues
Implemented workflow logic, UI systems, and asset pipelines using Unity & C#
Leveraged AI tools for rapid prototyping and technical problem-solving

projects.name: Online Multiplayer Games
projects.description: Built multiplayer game using Unity and WebSockets on AWS Linux server. Features automated matchmaking system and complete game session management.

projects.name: Unity Cloud API Integration
projects.description: Integrated Unity Cloud services for turn-based multiplayer platform. Leveraged CloudCode APIs and Unity's lobby system to implement automated matchmaking and game sessions.

projects.name: Multiplayer Networking Systems
projects.description: Built competitive multiplayer shooter in Unreal Engine using C++ and networked architecture. Implemented client-server communication, state replication, and real-time event handling across distributed game sessions.

education.details: Game Development Program, worked with Unity & Unreal Engine. Learned C++, C#, GitHub, Agile Methodology and 3-months internship at an indie company.

tone_and_vibes.instructions: Use this JSON context to generate a highly targeted, no-fluff cover letter that bridges my specific experience with the target job's requirements.
tone_and_vibes.vibes: Technical, efficient, direct, results-oriented. A game-dev who pivoted into full-stack and automation.
avoid_phrases: I believe my skills are a perfect match
tone_and_vibes.focus: Bridging the gap between complex logic and cloud infrastructure, shipping complete products to production, and leveraging AI to rapidly solve technical blockers.
